name: closed-loop test verifies the promoted rule provenance class equals pr-corpus exactly
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules 2>out.txt && grep -q 'class: pr-corpus' active-rules/test-pattern.yaml && grep -q 'verify=provenance_class_pr_corpus' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
